info.title: Bawsala Study Toolkit API
info.description: Implemented server route inventory. Browser mutations require the CSRF cookie/header pair and X-Bawsala-Request: 1. Detailed health data requires an admin session or X-Bawsala-Health-Token.

Forbidden.description: Authorization, CSRF, origin, or policy failure

404.description: Hidden unless an admin session or health token is supplied
